Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests. Also, "V.I.P." interviews Lucy Brains and "Carol & Sis" finds Chris' interview complicated.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Durward Kirby get into the ring for the boxing movie spoof, "Goldman's Boy."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Video.summary: Stiller & Meara star, showing off their act and joining in the sketch fun. Also: Carol as "Mary Worthless."
Video.title: Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Premiere guest stars Jim Nabors! Includes Tim Conway as a soldier, and Jim dropping in on "The Family."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Who loves ya, Carol? Guest star Telly Savalas, that's who!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Telly Savalas, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Tim Conway's engagement ring for Carol, made from the cursed Hope Diamond, causes no end of bad luck.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shani Wallis, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol offers a trio of guests: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest William Conrad appears in "The Family" sketch. Also: Harvey's news for his wife gives her twitches.
Video.title: William Conrad

Video.summary: Harvey and Tim are tipsy friends coming home from a night of carousing, plus a spoof of The Arabian Nights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Includes mother Carol offering daughter Vicki some advice on the way to the altar, and Tim as a handyman.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests as Carol's cabinmate. A "V.I.P." interview with Lynda Bird and a demonstration of E.S.P.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Mel Torme returns! Mel discovers the greatest superstar behind the counter of a drugstore.
Video.title: Mel Torme

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Totie Fields take part in Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence appear in commercial spoofs. Tim plays The Oldest Man and is in a pantomime.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol introduces the actors who dub voices for Spanish audiences, using a classic "Carol & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray returns! Sketches include Carol and Nanette as precocious kids, and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Mae East returns to "V.I.P.", a Presidential "Fireside Chat", and a case of laryngitis on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Don Adams guest stars. Don plays a talk show host, Carol's husband in "The Lost Purse," and a griping father.
Video.title: Don Adams

Video.summary: Carol salutes MGM with the help of guest stars Chita Rivera and Bob Newhart. Spoofs of classic movies abound.
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson all appear as guests on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Guest James Coco appears in movie spoof, "One Way Ticket," while Carol gets into an argument with margarine.
Video.title: James Coco

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Paul Sand guest. Paul plays a man seeking confidence, and Steve joins "The Putrified Forest."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Tim Conway & the cast head to Sydney, Australia! Tim leads the Sydney Orchestra, & Harvey deals with co-star.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Don Rickles and Nanette Fabray guest star. Fabray and Carol are expectant mothers, and Rickles is a salesman.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields
